name: wasm-bindgen
description: Generate bindings between WebAssembly and JavaScript

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help for wasm-bindgen

name: --version
-v
options.description: Show version for wasm-bindgen

options.name: --out-dir
options.description: Output directory

args.name: directory
args.description: Target directory to emit JS bindings, TS definitions, .wasm binaries, etc

options.name: --out-name
options.description: Set a custom output filename (Without extension. Defaults to crate name)

options.name: --target
options.description: What type of output to generate

options.name: --no-modules-global
options.description: Name of global to assign generated bindings to

options.name: --browser
options.description: Hint that JS should only be compatible with a browser

options.name: --typescript
options.description: Output a TypeScript definition file (on by default)

options.name: --no-typescript
options.description: Don't emit a *.d.ts file

options.name: --omit-imports
options.description: Don't emit imports in generated JavaScript

options.name: --debug
options.description: Include otherwise-extraneous debug checks in output

options.name: --no-demangle
options.description: Don't demangle Rust symbol names

options.name: --keep-debug
options.description: Keep debug sections in wasm files

options.name: --remove-name-section
options.description: Remove the debugging `name` section of the file

options.name: --remove-producers-section
options.description: Remove the telemetry `producers` section

options.name: --omit-default-module-path
options.description: Don't add WebAssembly fallback imports in generated JavaScript

options.name: --encode-into
options.description: Whether or not to use TextEncoder#encodeInto()

options.name: --nodejs
options.description: Deprecated, use `--target nodejs`

options.name: --web
options.description: Deprecated, use `--target web`

options.name: --no-modules
options.description: Deprecated, use `--target no-modules`

options.name: --weak-refs
options.description: Enable usage of the JS weak references proposal

options.name: --reference-types
options.description: Enable usage of WebAssembly reference types
